parts.text: Hi! I'm planning a trip to Barcelona next month.
I need help planning my Greece trip.
Here's my flight info: Aegean Airlines A3610, Athens to Santorini, departing Aug 20 at 10:15 AM, arriving 10:55 AM. Confirmation: GR2026X.
I'm gluten-free and prefer high-protein meals. I love authentic local cuisine.

Can you help me with this menu?

Taverna Nikolas
1. Moussaka - Layers of eggplant, potato, ground beef, bechamel. €12
2. Grilled Octopus - Fresh octopus, olive oil, lemon. €15
3. Greek Salad - Tomato, cucumber, feta, olives. €8
4. Pastitsio - Greek pasta bake with ground meat and bechamel. €11
5. Souvlaki Plate - Grilled chicken skewers, rice, tzatziki. €13
6. Spanakopita - Spinach and feta in phyllo pastry. €9
Help me set up my Tokyo trip!
Flying ANA NH105 from LAX to NRT, Sept 1 departure 11am, arriving Sept 2 at 3pm. Conf: ANA2026.
Staying at Park Hyatt Tokyo, Sept 2-8. Confirmation: PH789012.
I don't eat shellfish, I love ramen and sushi, and I try to keep meals under 700 calories.
